isEnabled.description: Enables auth (note: this has no effect in production environments)

defaultTokenLifespan.description: How long a token should remain valid for

logMissingPermissions.description: In enabled, a warning is logged on app start for any routes with missing permissions (note: any routes without defined permissions are inaccessible)

secureTokenGeneration.description: Whether a user must be authenticated to generate an API auth token

tokenSecret.description: A secret used to encode/decode Json Web Tokens

tokenIssuer.description: The identity of the issuer of the token

sessionCollection.description: Name of the database collection used to store user session data

sessionLifespan.description: The amount of time a session should remain valid

sessionRolling.description: Whether sessions should only expire after a period of inactivity

sessionSameSite.description: Asserts that a cookie must not be sent with cross-origin requests

sessionSecret.description: A secret used to encode/decode user sessions

sessionSecure.description: If true, cookie is only sent to the server when a request is made with the https scheme
